name: manifolder-mcp
description: Manifolder MCP server for editing Fabric spatial scenes

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -r src/vendor dist/ && cp src/client/ManifolderClient.js dist/client/ManifolderClient.js && cp src/client/node-helpers.js dist/client/node-helpers.js
scripts.sync:manifolder-client: cp ../Manifolder/client/js/ManifolderClient.js src/client/ManifolderClient.js && cp ../Manifolder/client/js/ManifolderClient.d.ts src/client/ManifolderClient.d.ts && cp ../Manifolder/client/js/node-helpers.js src/client/node-helpers.js && cp ../Manifolder/client/types.ts src/types.ts
scripts.check:manifolder-client-sync: cmp -s ../Manifolder/client/js/ManifolderClient.js src/client/ManifolderClient.js || (echo "ManifolderClient.js is out of sync. Run: npm run sync:manifolder-client" && exit 1); cmp -s ../Manifolder/client/js/ManifolderClient.d.ts src/client/ManifolderClient.d.ts || (echo "ManifolderClient.d.ts is out of sync. Run: npm run sync:manifolder-client" && exit 1); cmp -s ../Manifolder/client/js/node-helpers.js src/client/node-helpers.js || (echo "node-helpers.js is out of sync. Run: npm run sync:manifolder-client" && exit 1); cmp -s ../Manifolder/client/types.ts src/types.ts || (echo "types.ts is out of sync. Run: npm run sync:manifolder-client" && exit 1)
